title: Hiring Store Manager at Bikanervala Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Bikanervala Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bikanervala Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Surat team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bikanervala Advisory Limited:
Bikanervala Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala Advisory Limited!
